Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}That reminds me. I was reading this book during class once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}One of our classmates saw and said to me, "Wow, I'm surprised. So, you're the type to talk with your fists."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}What exactly do I look like to everyone else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}That must mean that I don't appear to be strong in other people's eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}No, it's important that I consider this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}He was surprised. That can only mean one thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}From what I understand, that term is used to describe small animals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Are you saying that I'm also being placed into that category?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}I am an anti-Shadow weapon, but I don't seem to be regarded as such...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I must correct this problem at once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}If it is not addressed, it could negatively impact my ability to carry out my duties.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Once I finish reading, I will start thinking of a solution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}During combat, the mental states of both sides play a significant role in the outcome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I want my presence to strike fear in the hearts of my enemies, but galvanize my allies, as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}What can I do to convey that kind of impression?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Ideally, it would be something to encourage people to depend on me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Maybe I can find some tips in this book...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}I think this is enough reading for now. We should return to our rooms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That reminds me. I was reading this book during class once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}And one of our classmates said to me, "Wow, I'm surprised. So you're the type to talk with your fists."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}What exactly do I look like to everyone else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}That must mean that I don't look strong in other people's eyes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}...Thank you. I know you're just being considerate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}But still, I can't help but feel bothered by it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I know this is supposed to be a compliment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}But if that's how they see me, it can only mean one thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I'm an anti-Shadow weapon, but most people don't see me as one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...Once I finish reading, I'll need to think of a solution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}During combat, the mental states of both sides play a significant role in the outcome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I want to be able to intimidate my enemies, but also encourage my teammates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}What can I do to give everyone that kind of impression?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Ideally, it would be something that makes me appear reliable in battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}Maybe I can find some tips in this book...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]increased after reading about the[n]main character's righteous spirit...[n]{f 1 1}
